groupings.title: Repository Context
groupings.description: Skills for making repositories ready for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, Amp, Aider, Cline, Roo Code, Continue, OpenHands, Replit Agent, and generic AI coding agents with deterministic scans, context files, maps, doctor checks, and task packs.
